_comment: KRL Writer configuration file for KUKA KRC2 robot 3D printing
_calibration_instructions: 1. Set extruder analog input to 1V (ANOUT = 0.1 on KRC2)
2. Place container on scale, tare to zero
4. Divide grams by seconds: flow_at_1v_g_per_sec = grams / seconds
5. Verify linearity by measuring at 2V and checking if flow doubles
If not linear, reduce max_volt to the linear range of your extruder
_orientation_comment: Fixed tool orientation during printing (A, B, C in degrees)
_approach_comment: Approach position near print area in joint angles (A1-A6)
